items.a: Nie. GambleZone to niezależna strona porównawcza. Nie przyjmujemy zakładów, nie przechowujemy sald ani nie przetwarzamy płatności hazardowych.
Możemy otrzymać prowizję, gdy odwiedzisz operatora przez nasze linki. Nigdy nie wpływa to na nasze oceny redakcyjne, które podlegają przejrzystej metodologii.

affiliate.title: Informacja o afiliacji
affiliate.intro: At GambleZone, we believe in transparency and honesty with our visitors.

paragraphs: GambleZone participates in various affiliate marketing programs. This means that when you click on certain links to online casinos, sportsbooks, or other gambling-related services and complete a qualifying action, such as registering or making a deposit, GambleZone may earn a commission at no additional cost to you.
These commissions help support the operation of GambleZone, allowing us to provide free content, reviews, guides, and comparisons.

sections.heading: Editorial Independence
paragraphs: Affiliate partnerships do not influence our opinions or recommendations. We strive to provide fair, accurate, and unbiased information based on research and our team's experience in the online gambling industry.

sections.heading: Third-Party Websites
paragraphs: Links on GambleZone direct users to third-party websites operated independently from GambleZone. We are not responsible for the content, offers, terms, promotions, or privacy practices of these external websites. Users should review the policies and terms of any third-party website before engaging with its services.

sections.heading: Gambling Responsibility
paragraphs: Online gambling involves financial risk and should be undertaken responsibly. GambleZone encourages visitors to gamble only within their means and only if they are of legal gambling age in their jurisdiction.

sections.heading: Changes to This Disclosure
paragraphs: GambleZone reserves the right to update this Affiliate Disclosure at any time. Any changes will be published on this page with an updated effective date.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: If you have any questions regarding this Affiliate Disclosure, please contact GambleZone through the Contact page.

privacy.title: Polityka prywatności
privacy.intro: Welcome to our website. Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our affiliate website.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
paragraphs: We may collect non-personal information such as your IP address, browser type, device information, pages visited, and time spent on our website. If you contact us, we may also collect the information you provide voluntarily, such as your name and email address.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
paragraphs: The information we collect may be used to:
bullets: Improve our website and user experience.

sections.heading: Affiliate Links
paragraphs: Our website contains affiliate links to third-party gambling operators and services. If you click on these links and register or make a purchase, we may receive a commission at no additional cost to you. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of third-party websites.

sections.heading: Cookies
paragraphs: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze website traffic, and support our affiliate partnerships. You can disable cookies through your browser settings, although some features of the website may not function properly.

sections.heading: Third-Party Services
paragraphs: We may use third-party analytics providers, advertising partners, and affiliate tracking platforms. These services may collect information according to their own privacy policies.

sections.heading: Data Security
paragraphs: We take reasonable measures to protect the information collected through our website. However, no method of data transmission or storage is completely secure.

sections.heading: Children's Privacy
paragraphs: Our website is intended for users who are at least 18 years old (or the legal gambling age in their jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors.

sections.heading: Changes to This Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

sections.heading: Contact Us
paragraphs: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the contact page available on our website.

cookies.title: Polityka plików cookie
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how our website uses cookies and similar technologies to improve your browsing experience and support the functionality of our services.

sections.heading: What Are Cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences, improve performance, and analyze visitor behavior.

sections.heading: How We Use Cookies
paragraphs: We use cookies to:
bullets: Analyze website traffic and visitor interactions.
Measure the effectiveness of our affiliate marketing activities.

sections.heading: Types of Cookies We Use
paragraphs: Essential Cookies: Necessary for the operation of the website and cannot be disabled.
Analytics Cookies: Help us understand how visitors use our website by collecting anonymous statistical information.
Affiliate Tracking Cookies: Allow us to track referrals to our affiliate partners so we may receive a commission when eligible actions are completed.
Advertising Cookies: Our partners may use cookies to deliver relevant advertisements and measure the performance of advertising campaigns.
Third-Party Cookies: Some cookies may be placed by third-party services, including analytics providers, advertising networks, and affiliate platforms.

sections.heading: Managing Cookies
paragraphs: Most web browsers allow you to control or disable cookies through their settings. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of this website.

sections.heading: Changes to This Cookie Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

sections.heading: Contact Us
paragraphs: If you have any questions regarding this Cookie Policy, please contact us through the contact page available on our website.

terms.title: Warunki użytkowania
terms.intro: Welcome to GambleZone. By accessing or using GambleZone, you agree to comply with these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use GambleZone.

sections.heading: Website Purpose
paragraphs: GambleZone provides informational content, reviews, comparisons, and promotional offers related to online gambling operators and services. The information provided is for general informational purposes only.

sections.heading: Affiliate Disclosure
paragraphs: GambleZone contains affiliate links. If you click on these links and register or make a purchase, GambleZone may receive a commission at no additional cost to you. Our reviews and recommendations are based on our own opinions and research.

sections.heading: Eligibility
paragraphs: GambleZone is intended for individuals who are at least 18 years old, or the legal gambling age in their jurisdiction. It is your responsibility to ensure that online gambling is legal where you reside.

sections.heading: Responsible Gambling
paragraphs: GambleZone supports responsible gambling. Gambling should be viewed as entertainment, not as a way to earn money. If you believe gambling is becoming a problem, we encourage you to seek professional assistance.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All content available on GambleZone, including text, graphics, logos, images, and other materials, is the property of GambleZone unless otherwise stated and may not be copied, reproduced, or distributed without prior written permission.

sections.heading: Third-Party Websites
paragraphs: GambleZone may contain links to third-party websites. GambleZone does not own, control, or accept responsibility for the content, services, or privacy practices of these external websites.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
paragraphs: While GambleZone strives to keep all information accurate and up to date, we make no warranties or guarantees regarding its accuracy, completeness, or reliability. Online gambling offers, promotions, and bonuses may change without prior notice.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the fullest extent permitted by law, GambleZone shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of GambleZone or any third-party websites linked from it.

sections.heading: Changes to These Terms
paragraphs: GambleZone reserves the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Updated versions will be posted on this page with a revised effective date.

sections.heading: Governing Law
paragraphs: These Terms of Use shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the applicable laws of the jurisdiction in which the operator of GambleZone is established.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Use, please contact GambleZone through the Contact page.

contact.success: Wiadomość wysłana! Odezwiemy się tak szybko, jak to możliwe.
contact.legalDesc: W sprawach prawnych, partnerskich lub dotyczących zgodności skontaktuj się z nami bezpośrednio.

about.title: Stworzone przez znawców branży, dla graczy
about.lead: W GambleZone jesteśmy czymś więcej niż kolejną stroną o hazardzie — sami jesteśmy graczami.
paragraphs: Nasz zespół tworzą pasjonaci gry z ponad 10-letnim doświadczeniem w branży hazardowej. Podczas naszych karier jako Product Managerowie, Product Ownerzy i Key Account Managerowie widzieliśmy, jak branża działa za kulisami. Nauczyliśmy się, co tworzy świetne doświadczenie gracza, ale widzieliśmy też praktyki, które mogą podważyć zaufanie.
Właśnie dlatego stworzyliśmy GambleZone.

Nasz cel jest prosty: zbudować platformę, która stawia graczy na pierwszym miejscu. Każde kasyno, bukmacher i promocja, które prezentujemy, są starannie oceniane pod kątem jakości, niezawodności, doświadczenia gracza i ogólnej wartości — a nie pustych obietnic marketingowych.
Wiemy, czego oczekują gracze, bo sami nimi jesteśmy. Rozumiemy emocje dużej wygranej, frustrację słabej obsługi klienta i znaczenie wyboru godnego zaufania operatora.
Niezależnie od tego, czy szukasz uczciwych recenzji, ekskluzywnych ofert, czy najlepszych miejsc do gry, GambleZone pomaga Ci podejmować świadome decyzje z pewnością.
about.closing: Witaj w GambleZone — stworzone przez profesjonalistów z branży, zbudowane dla graczy.
about.contactDesc: Masz pytanie lub znalazłeś błąd? Nasz zespół chętnie pomoże.
